mainEntity.name: Is this just another AI automation chatbot?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, it is a structured planning assistant designed to help you audit existing business workflows and design safe AI agent pilot plans before you start building.

mainEntity.name: What kind of workflow should I start with?

acceptedAnswer.text: Start with repetitive, low-risk, internal workflows that consume a lot of manual time but do not require complex, nuanced human judgment.

mainEntity.name: What if my process is messy?

acceptedAnswer.text: A messy process should be mapped and standardized before applying AI automation. The builder helps identify these gaps so you can structure your workflow first.

mainEntity.name: Will this build the automation for me?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, this tool provides audits, readiness scores, and pilot plans. You or your developer will need to build the actual automation based on the structured plan.

mainEntity.name: Can it help me design a Custom GPT or AI agent?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, it assists in designing the specifications, instructions, and guardrails for Custom GPTs and AI agents.

mainEntity.name: Does it connect directly to my tools?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, the builder is a planning and advisory tool. It does not integrate directly into your software stack.

mainEntity.name: Is this safe for customer-facing workflows?

acceptedAnswer.text: Customer-facing AI requires strict guardrails. The tool helps you plan 'human in the loop' safeguards and pilot phases to manage risks before deployment.

mainEntity.name: Can agencies use this with clients?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, agencies and consultants can use this tool to structure client discovery, audit client workflows, and generate professional automation readiness assessments.

mainEntity.name: What do I get after using it?

acceptedAnswer.text: You will receive an automation readiness score, an identified list of automation opportunities, and a structured, safe AI agent pilot plan.

mainEntity.name: Is this legal, financial, tax, or compliance advice?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, this tool supports workflow planning and pilot design. It is not legal, financial, tax, HR, lending, accounting, or compliance advice. Sensitive decisions must remain under qualified human review.
